author: assistant
conditions: Implementation must remain confined to the evidence-only inventory, evaluator, evidence report, focused tests, and directly necessary documentation and self-model records.
The evaluator must preserve selection_effect none and must not mutate ContextPackManifest.items.
Existing compact representation coverage must be inventoried before conclusions are drawn about representation fitness.
Rich distance-one and compact distance-two representations must remain explicitly hypothetical and diagnostic.
No new persisted compact-summary or compact-artifact contract may be introduced.
Evaluation must distinguish lineage isolation from token-budget exclusion.
The 33 connected targets must receive deterministic token and coverage evaluation; the ten isolated targets must be reported as a separate diagnostic class.
Token-accounting rules and representation provenance must be deterministic and recorded in the evidence.
Do not change graph_neighborhood_context_items, build_latest_context_manifest, token-budget enforcement, or context-pack item rendering.
Do not change scripts/build_context_pack.py, ask_provider.py, compare_providers.py, provider prompts, prompt rendering, or any CLI behavior.
Do not add automatic target inference or automatic graph-local context inclusion.
Do not add or edit authoritative lineage relations or persist graph state.
Do not add retrieval, embeddings, reranking, production index mutation, memory-store mutation, or runtime-manifest mutation.
Global ontology, invariants, and governance context must remain semantically distinct from graph-local evidence.
GAP-0002 must remain open after this slice.
Any scope expansion beyond this warrant requires a separate proposed and admitted plan.
reason: PLAN-20260716-0002 is a bounded, testable, evidence-only response to the repository-wide finding that whole-artifact representation granularity causes graph-neighborhood budget starvation. COMP-0027 records independent provider agreement that existing compact representations should be inventoried and hypothetical distance-aware packing should be evaluated before target selection, provider exposure, automatic inclusion, or a new persisted compact-summary contract is considered. The admitted work preserves selection_effect none, keeps GAP-0002 open, and changes no context-selection behavior.
scope: Admit only the evidence-only implementation described by PLAN-20260716-0002: inventory existing L0, L1, ABS, and other compact representation coverage across the audited artifact corpus; measure deterministic token costs; compare the current whole-artifact baseline with hypothetical rich distance-one and compact distance-two scenarios across the 33 connected targets; classify the ten lineage-isolated targets separately; and produce a decision-ready evidence report. No persisted compact-representation contract or context-selection behavior is admitted.
